channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Road crumbling away by pavement, 2nd April
item.description:
Beginnings of a pot hole close to the edge of the pavement. The road is in a generally disgraceful condition and needs proper attention and repair

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thesiger Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling in tree pit, 2nd April
item.description:
Dog fouling in tree pit outside 18a

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Hayes Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling on pavement, 2nd April
item.description:
Dog fouling on pavement outside 14 Hayes Way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Hayes Way, Park Langley, Greater London

item.title: Dog fouling in tree pit, 2nd April
item.description:
Dog fouling in tree pit opposite 15 Whitecroft Way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Whitecroft Way, Park Langley, Greater London

item.title: Hob left on grass verge, 2nd April
item.description:
Hob left on grass verge on Hayes Way, close to Top Park.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 116, Hayes Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 2nd April
item.description:
Car has been in access road since July 2024. It has now been declared SORN (it was taxed when previously reported) but I do not believe it can be considered as off road. It is blocking the access road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sunray Avenue, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 2nd April
item.description:
There is a sofa and other items abandoned along the river.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crayford Way, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plastic on pavement, 2nd April
item.description:
Plastic most likely from nearby skip.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Brabourne Rise, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping corner of 1a St Augustines Road junction of Upper Abbey Road, 2nd April
item.description:
Someone has dumped a mattress, a fridge,3 black sacks next to the bins and also put more black sacks inside the bins so they are all overflowing. This was reported yesterday and was told it had been fixed but it has not. Please can this be removed asap before more rubbish is added.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Abbey Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins still not being emptied by the council, 2nd April
item.description:
Empty the bins regularly- why have the council suddenly stopped doing this? Bet the new builds were being subjected too won’t like this when they are trying to sell?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wallis Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is offensive graffiti on bus shelter, 2nd April
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cray Avenue, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (offensive)

item.title: Road block signs left on pavement, 2nd April
item.description:
Orange road block signs that were used to shield the lamp post during repair have been left against 112 College Road pedestrian gate- photo attached.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking without permit, 2nd April
item.description:
There is a man who frequently visits the Ladbrokes on that road. He parks illegally without a permit for an extended amount of time. He has been given tickets before but still continues to park there. Has also been seen arguing and pressuring parking wardens to not give him a ticket. This has become an almost daily occurrence with this man
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65, Junction Road, Archway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on glass of bus shelter, Rectory Road, Beckenham, outside River Grove Park, 2nd April
item.description:
Graffiti on glass of bus shelter, Rectory Road, Beckenham, outside River Grove Park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): River Grove Park, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Loads of loose cable, 2nd April
item.description:
Massive trip hazard the cable has just been left over the floor.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Groombridge Close, Blackfen, Greater London

item.title: Barrier left alongside numer 24, 2nd April
item.description:
Been left a week ago

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warneford Street, Hackney, London

item.title: Graffiti is now spreading / getting worse, 2nd April
item.description:
Was just one for a long time - now is increasing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wandsworth Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light pole damaged and not working, 2nd April
item.description:
This light has not been working for probably over a year now. The pole was replaced when it was damaged. The damaged pole is till next to the new pole like a stump.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Starbuck Close, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken pavement outside 50 Holly Rd, 2nd April
item.description:
Foul water (urine) discharged from pipe in front garden wall of 50 Holly Rd is going under the pavement and had broken the slab

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Holly Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole at Wandsworth Road, 2nd April
item.description:
There is a deep pothole at Wandsworth Road (on the height of Wyvil Road). Around this hole, there are several other holes in the road, which could be very hazardous for cyclists or motor/scooter drivers, who risk serious injury if they ride over it. The depth and low visibility of those holes increases the danger, especially under busy traffic conditions or poor lighting. Urgent action is required

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wandsworth Road, Vauxhall, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
